first, select the right tool to remove the wheel
next, deflate the tier completely
carefully locate the puncture hole and mark it with a pin
select a patch from the repair kit and apply it firmly
use the pump to inflate the tier to the correct pressure
check for additional leaks by submerging the tube in a bucket of water
if there are no new problems, reattach the wheel back to the bicycle

begin by mixing the butter and sugar
spread the dough so the cookies bake evenly
pre-heat the oven to the appropriate temperature
evenly space the cookie shapes onto the baking sheet
insert the tray and bake until the cookie edges are golden
after the baking time is complete, cool the cookies on the rack for five minutes
pour yourself a glass of milk and enjoy warm cookies fresh out of the oven
lightly wet your brush before starting to painting
add a small bit of color to your brush
mix two or more paintings to create additional colors
Apply thin layers to keep the paper from tearing,
use a smaller rush to add fine details to the picture.
If a section looks too wet, blot it, gently pick up any excess paint.
When the painting is finished, glow warm air on it for moving or storing it
